seo.title: Yashraj Nayak - Developer Portfolio
seo.description: Developer Portfolio of Yashraj Nayak - Program Manager, Developer Relations
seo.author: Yashraj Nayak

paragraphs: Developer and people person with 9+ years of experience building and scaling developer communities across India and APAC. I currently lead University Alliances and Student Programs for Databricks in India, helping build a stronger pipeline of data and AI talent across top institutions.

Previously, I supported MongoDB User Groups globally, contributed to GitHub Developer Relations programs in India, grew OutSystems' APAC community, scaled Progate's India community to 200,000+ learners, and worked on community programs at Skillenza. I am passionate about creating authentic spaces where developers can learn, collaborate, and thrive.

items.name: GitHub Constellation 2024
description: GitHub's developer conference featuring a keynote by GitHub CEO Thomas Dohmke, 20+ speakers and 900+ in-person attendees.
Collaborated with external agencies and multiple teams within organization.
Managed end-to-end execution, including website management, venue logistics, emceeing, speakers and attendee engagement.

items.name: GitTogether Meetups Automation System
description: 4-stage GitHub Actions pipeline with multi-repository orchestration and API integration
Automated issue creation, assignment, and lifecycle management with 80% reduction in manual overhead
Tech Stack: Node.js, GitHub Actions, GraphQL/REST APIs, YAML configuration management

items.name: GitTogethers Registration Web Platform
description: Modern responsive web application for developer event registration and check-in management
GitHub API integration with smart event filtering, form validation, and mobile optimization
Tech Stack: Vanilla JavaScript (ES6), jQuery, CSS Grid/Flexbox, GitHub API

jobs.role: University Alliances and Student Programs Lead, India
responsibilities: Own Databricks' university alliances and student programs strategy for India
Build partnerships with faculty, university leadership, and student communities to integrate Databricks into teaching, projects, and research
Design and execute scalable workshops, hackathons, and curriculum collaborations focused on Spark, Delta Lake, MLflow, and the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform
Collaborated with regional teams and internal stakeholders to align the MongoDB User Groups program
Supported 40 existing MongoDB User Groups globally and launched or revived chapters in Seoul, Abu Dhabi, Rio de Janeiro, and Cape Town
Managed operations as the DRI for 24 user group events, totaling 4,600+ RSVPs
Supported planning and execution of GitHub Constellation 2024, engaging 900+ in-person attendees in Bengaluru
Contributed to programs including the Global Meetups Program, GitHub Universe Recap, and GitHub Connect India
Developed processes and automations to scale GitTogethers across Bengaluru, Delhi NCR, Hyderabad, and Mumbai
Expanded global community programs throughout Asia-Pacific
Led initiatives like #14DaysOfOutSystems Challenge and OutSystems Student Accelerator
Supported OutSystems User Group organizers across APAC to build strong local communities
Explored and built early-stage partnerships for Progate in India, finalizing academic partnerships with 15+ schools and universities
Helped this Japanese coding learning platform to grow userbase to 200,000+ learners in India
Established Community Partnership with Hacktoberfest 2020 and other non-profits
Organized 30+ Learning Jams across major Indian cities
Reached 6,000+ high school students through Hour of Code™ 2018 Campaign
Worked alongside teams from DigitalOcean, AWS, Digital Domain, Société Générale, etc to plan and execute developer events across the country (both online and offline)
Helped in the execution of Hack2Innovate 2017, series of 7 deep-tech hackathons while working with teams from T-Hub, Microsoft, NVIDIA and PwC
Handled Skillenza's student developer engagement and supported 25+ hackathons in different campuses across the country
Managed onboarding for new partners and supported existing ones
Handled in-person communications between Uber and its partner community

items.name: Microsoft Applied Skills: Accelerate App Development by using GitHub Copilot

footer.tagline: Let's connect and build something amazing together!
